marketSize_JOD.note: Statista 2025: $2.55B ecommerce market, 9.4% CAGR to 2029. COD dominant. Instagram is primary discovery channel.
marketSize_JOD.aiPromptGuidance: For handmade or craft Instagram sellers use handmadeCraftOnline_JOD. For fashion or beauty use fashionBeautyOnline_JOD. For home goods use homeGoodsOnline_JOD. Never use ecommerceJordan_JOD_approx for a single-product home-based seller — that is the entire national ecommerce figure.

marketplace.name: Noon.com
marketplace.priceRange: Varies — mass-market pricing, often 5-15% below Instagram sellers
marketplace.mainStrength: Regional logistics, brand trust, wide product range, fast delivery

marketplace.name: OpenSooq
marketplace.priceRange: Free listings — seller sets price, typically 10-30% below retail
marketplace.mainStrength: Largest Arabic classifieds platform, free listings, 60M+ users MENA

marketplace.name: CashBasha
marketplace.targetSegment: Jordanian online shoppers preferring local platform
marketplace.mainStrength: Local trust, COD expertise, Jordanian brand

instagram_social_sellers.name: Local Instagram Handmade Sellers (archetype)
instagram_social_sellers.targetSegment: Jordanian women 20-40 buying gifts, home decor, crafts
instagram_social_sellers.mainStrength: Personal trust, low prices, fast WhatsApp response, local delivery same day
instagram_social_sellers.note: Hundreds of home-based sellers compete on Amman Instagram in candles, decor, clothing, food. Most price lower than branded sellers. This is the primary competitor for any Instagram-based home business.

fashion_social.name: Wakilni
fashion_social.mainStrength: Access to international products, trusted local operation

marketContext.codRisk: Budget 10-15% of COD orders for refusal/returns — build into forecasts

seasonalDemand.ramadan: March-April 2025: gifting and food orders spike 40-60%
seasonalDemand.eid_alFitr: April 2025: peak gifting season — candles, decor, clothing highest demand
seasonalDemand.weddingSeason: April-June and September-November: strong demand for gift bundles and decor
seasonalDemand.summerSlump: July-August: lowest general consumer spending — plan for 30-40% revenue drop

handmade_instagram_home.note: Variable cost heavy — scales with sales volume. Fixed cost portion is very low.

averageOrderValue_JOD.note: For handmade sellers, individual item price is 8-20 JOD but gift bundles raise average to 30-50 JOD. AI should use individual item AOV unless bundles are mentioned.

redFlags.dropshippingWarning: If gross margin <20% AND CAC >15 JOD — unprofitable model.
redFlags.codRefusalBuffer: Reserve 10-15% of COD revenue for refused deliveries.
redFlags.cacWarning_handmade: If CAC rises above 15 JOD while average order value is under 20 JOD — unsustainable. Shift to organic or bundle pricing.

jordanContext.primaryDiscoveryChannel: Instagram — 80%+ of online discovery in Amman via social media
jordanContext.cartAbandonmentRisk: 40%+ abandon if checkout > 3 steps — keep it simple
jordanContext.codDominance: Cash on delivery is still 70%+ of all orders. Budget for 10-15% refusal rate on COD.
